disclaimer: Texto de ejemplo para practicar lectura bilingue.

paragraphs.en: The plane landed at Narita Airport at six in the morning. The sun was just starting to rise over the city.
paragraphs.es: El avion aterrizo en el aeropuerto de Narita a las seis de la manana. El sol apenas estaba comenzando a elevarse sobre la ciudad.

paragraphs.en: I picked up my suitcase and walked toward the exit. The signs were all in Japanese, but I could read the English translations underneath.
paragraphs.es: Recogi mi maleta y camine hacia la salida. Los carteles estaban todos en japones, pero podia leer las traducciones en ingles debajo.

paragraphs.en: The train to Tokyo was fast and clean. I watched the buildings pass by through the window, amazed by how organized everything was.
paragraphs.es: El tren hacia Tokio era rapido y limpio. Observe los edificios pasar por la ventana, asombrado por lo organizado que era todo.

paragraphs.en: Tokyo was bigger than I expected. The streets were clean, and everyone moved with a clear purpose.
paragraphs.es: Tokio era mas grande de lo que esperaba. Las calles estaban limpias, y todos caminaban con un proposito claro.

paragraphs.en: I found a small restaurant near the station. The menu was only in Japanese, so I used my phone to translate it.
paragraphs.es: Encontre un restaurante pequeno cerca de la estacion. El menu estaba solo en japones, asi que use mi telefono para traducirlo.

paragraphs.en: The ramen was delicious. The chef smiled when I said 'oishii' in my broken Japanese.
paragraphs.es: El ramen estaba delicioso. El chef sonrio cuando dije 'oishii' en mi japones roto.
